source_discovery_method: derive tenant/board identifier from company ATS URL, then use the public JSON endpoint when available
list_fetch_method: bounded GET/POST to source JSON list endpoint through the source runner
detail_fetch_method: not required for core fields unless the list payload omits description or normalized geo evidence
pagination_method: use source offset/limit/page cursor when documented; otherwise cap single-list fetches
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: list-payload: Use raw id/job id when available; fall back to stable canonical URL id.
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: list-payload: Public JSON/list payload usually exposes location fields; raw fixture must prove variants.
country_region_city_rule: list-payload: Public JSON/list payload usually exposes location fields; raw fixture must prove variants.
remote_type_rule: list-payload: Use explicit workplace/remote fields first, then conservative title/location text.
posting_date_rule: list-payload: Use source date fields when present; otherwise document source absence.
rate_limit: default per-host serialization plus source daily budget; lower for uncertified tenants

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: accepted rows must pass title/company/canonical_url and row-level quality gate

runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: audit raw payloads and add field-specific parser/backfill fixture
